_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Build assurance cases for AI systems that support the needs of different stakeholders (e.g., acquisition community, commanders, and operators).
reference_document_element_description: Establish and maintain the enterprise AI inventory, cataloging all AI systems in production with risk tier, owner, training data provenance, model version, and review status.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-002 (AG, cosine: 0.624), AG-T-005 (AG, cosine: 0.621).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.524). Shared vocabulary: [ai, systems]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, assurance, build, cases, commanders, community] vs WIDAI-only terms [cataloging, data, enterprise, establish, inventory, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.864, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.4%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Build assurance cases for AI systems that support the needs of different stakeho" and "Establish and maintain the enterprise AI inventory, cataloging all AI systems in". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.627 > STS 0.524 (gap +0.103). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, systems] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [ai, systems]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, assurance, build, cases, commanders, community]. WIDAI-only: [cataloging, data, enterprise, establish, inventory, maintain].
